title: Non Stick Frying Pans 24cm, Omelette Pan for Induction Hob, Granite Frying Pan Stone Pans
features: 🌹【ULTRA NON STICK & SCRATCH RESISTANT】 - Eco-friendly Granite Coating is ultra non stick and scratch resistant that enhances both durability and cooking performance. Food slides right off the truly nonstick surface for optimum cooking.
🌹【GREEN & TOXIC FREE】 - 100% PFOA free , lead and cadmium free nonstick coating, ideal for health cooking. Choose ZUOFENG frying pans nonstick for greener and safer cookware.

.🌹【HEATS QUICKLY & EVENLY 】- Premium aluminum alloy material combined with magnetized base allows for rapid heat transfer and long-time use, satisfying cookware like induction, gas, ceramic, electric, halogen & solid fuel cookers.(The 20cm frying pan has less induction area,If you are not sure whether your induction furnace is sensitive, it is recommended to buy a frying pan above 24cm.)
🌹【CLASSY & ELEGANT DESIGN】 - The stone frying pans’ streamlined design integrated with ergonomic wood grain handle adds to its comfort, convenience and slip resistance during cooking.
🌹【STURDY & EASY TO CLEAN】 - The nonstick fry pan interior is made of cast aluminum,which is more durable and sturdy. Super easy to cleanup, Dishwasher-safe for quick cleanup.( Hand wash recommended )
description: Product Description Perfect for whipping up all kind of recipes, this granite rock frying pan is a must-have to release your Inner Chef. Everything you need to prepare delicious stir-fry meals and more, is in this Non-stick fry pan. Made of thick aluminum material, the nonstick granite frying pan heats quickly and evenly for perfect results. Its granite nonstick surface promotes healthy cooking by requiring less oil.The frying pan can suit many cookwares like induction cooker, radiant-cooker and so on. 100% free of PFOS, PFOA. Non-toxic materials. High-quality coatings from Germany with excellent non-stick properties With three-layer non-stick coating based on high-Level technology, the performance is accompanied by increased durability and healthy materials Made from natural materials with 100% Free of PFOS, PFOA, our cookware ensures your daily cooking being always safer and healthier ZUOFENG Non-stick Frying Pan High-quality non-stick coating Durable and Reliable Construction Easy Release and Clean up Fast and Consistent Heating PFOA-free, Healthy cooking Handle is Heat resistant, Easy to hold. Non-stick Stone Pans Use and Maintenance ---Before the first time use, please remove the packing material and all the tags, clean with detergent or warm water, then coats a thin layer of oil or other grease. ---Because the non-stick pan conducts heat quickly and uniformly, it can reach the proper cooking temperature by using medium and small heat. Put oil into non-stick pan before heating. ---When cooking, Do not use sharp or metal shovel, please use a special spatula such as a silicone shovel, a wooden shovel, or a nylon shovel, as this can prolong the service life of the stone frying Pan. ---To clean the non-stick pan, Hand washed gently with soft cloth and dry it. For cleaning of stubborn food stain, you'd better soak the pot in hot water with detergent for a period of time. ---Normally you can use a dishwasher, but hand washing is recommended. The use of dishwasher may reduce the service life of the frying Pan. ---After using the new frying Pan, apply a layer of cooking oil for maintenance at regular intervals. ULTRA NON-STICK The non stick pan cooking ware features a durable and long lasting nonstick coating, Easy to cleaning & healthy cooking, Food slides right off the truly nonstick surface for optimum cooking EASY TO CLEAN High quality nonstick interior allows for easier cleanup,Just rinse with water, wipe gently with a rag, Dishwasher-safe for quick cleanup.( Hand wash recommended ) HEATS QUICKLY Premium aluminum alloy material combined with magnetized base allows for rapid heat transfer and long-time use, satisfying cookware like induction, gas, ceramic, electric, halogen & solid fuel cookers DURABLE AND STURDY The nonstick fry pan interior is made of die-cast aluminum,which is more durable and sturdy; The frying pan has heat resistant bakelite handle which are suitable for grasping and staying cooling while cooking Non Stick Frying Pan Non Stick Frying Pan With Lid Non Stick Frying Pan Non Stick Frying Pan With Lid Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 11,521 4.6 out of 5 stars 11,521 4.6 out of 5 stars 11,521 4.6 out of 5 stars 11,521 Price £12.32 £ 12 . 32 £23.66 £ 23 . 66 £18.41 £ 18 . 41 £27.69 £ 27 . 69 Optional Size 20cm/24cm/28cm 24cm/28cm 20cm/24cm/28cm 28cm Material Aluminum Aluminum Aluminum Aluminum Coating Material Granite Non Stick Coating Granite Non Stick Coating Granite Non Stick Coating Granite Non Stick Coating Hob Compatibility Induction, Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen Induction, Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen Induction, Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen Induction, Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen
